summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The job is not a dedupe cluster, no shared canonical was selected, no merge/fix/close action is recommended, and security-sensitive listed refs are scoped to route_security.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with unresolved proof/review blockers; keep open as its own work item.
Draft PR with unresolved proof and review-bot blocker; keep open as independent work rather than close or merge.
Draft automation PR lacks required real behavior proof; keep open as independent work.
Useful draft maintainer PR tied to an open issue; keep open as independent work pending maintainer review.
Useful draft maintainer PR tied to an open issue; keep open as independent work pending maintainer review.
Broad docs/comment PR is not a dedupe/closure candidate in this shard; keep open as independent work.
Preflight explicitly classifies this ref as security-sensitive; route only this item to central OpenClaw security handling.
Useful contributor PR with proof supplied and open linked issue; keep open as independent work pending maintainer review.
Open PR appears related to an already-fixed issue but has failing proof/checks and no allowed low-signal close path; keep open as independent for maintainer review.
Closed security-sensitive candidate is non-mutating but should still be scoped out of ProjectClownfish handling.
